2231940.name: MOVE ON
2231940.description:
MOVE ON is a Drama Visual Novel game where players can choose their own path. where we will play the role of the protagonist of the story In which the game presents the 5 emotional release of the human.


Main Features
Single Player - The game must be played alone. so that players can absorb the atmosphere and various stories of the game
Visual Novel - Players will be able to immerse themselves in the story of the 5 Stages of Grief story.
Quick Time Event - Players must use their wits to solve various situations within the game.
Environment - The environment in the game of each Stage will be different terms of the environment.
